name: Pumpkin Roll
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1. In a large bowl, beat together 3 Eggs and 1 cup Sugar for about 5 minutes.
2. Add the Pumpkin, Lemon juice, Flour, Cinnamon, Nutmeg, Ginger, Salt, and Baking powder to the egg mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured jelly roll pan or lipped cookie sheet.
4. Sprinkle chopped nuts on top of the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and immediately place on a kitchen towel dusted with powdered sugar.
7. Roll up the cake in the towel, ensuring it is tightly rolled to prevent unrolling during cutting.
8. Allow the rolled cake to cool completely.
9. Unroll the cooled cake and spread the filling evenly over the surface.
10. Roll the cake and filling together into a dessert roll.
11. Chill the roll for at least 30 minutes before slicing into 1/2 inch slices.
